\caption{Posterior-median IMF parameters for the Chabrier-like model with sampled mass cutoffs (\texttt{chabrier\_smooth\_bounds}), fit to each simulated stellar sample. Errors on $m_c$, $\sigma$, $\Gamma$, and $M_{\max}$ are 16th/84th posterior percentiles. $m_c$ is the lognormal characteristic mass, $\sigma$ is the lognormal width in dex, $\Gamma$ is the high-mass slope ($\mathrm{d}N/\mathrm{d}\log m \propto m^\Gamma$; Salpeter $=-1.35$), and $M_{\max}$ is the upper-mass cutoff. Entries marked \ldots\ have no stellar catalog in the local data directory. The bottom two rows give canonical published values from the literature (no uncertainties or $M_{\max}$ are defined).}
\label{table:imf_params}
